[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up of a white cat’s face fills the frame, with an overlaid cartoon-style filter showing large black-and-white eyes.

Main Subject:
A white cat with pale fur, visible pink nose and a tongue sticking out, looking toward the camera. The cat’s whiskers extend outward from the cheeks, and both ears are upright.

Setting:
The background is indoors and out of focus, showing muted gray and brown tones with a soft blur that suggests a wall and ceiling or overhead elements.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and even, creating gentle highlights on the cat’s fur. The camera angle is straight-on and very close, with the cat’s face centered. Over the cat’s eyes area, there are two large, stylized black-and-white shapes resembling cartoon eyelids or eyes, and the rest of the image appears to be a photo with a playful overlay.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a white cat close to the camera with its tongue out. A cartoon-style eye overlay is placed on top of the cat’s face.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
